_comment: Per-vehicle rx-side calibration sidecar for scripts/drivetest_to_observations.py. Phase 1 (issue #30). All cable_loss_db values are null on purpose — the uploader REFUSES to run until each band of acquisition has a measured number. See docs/operations/drivetest-phase1.md § 'Calibração de cable_loss_db' for the CW-injection procedure.
